revisions.what_changed: Full M3 workshop: 15 content files, Industry Perspectives, 8-round persona dialogue (7 upgrades), OpKit OK-M3-001. REC-001 margin dispute transparently handled with dual-scenario modeling across all margin-dependent outputs.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong framework with novel bifurcation methodology and kill criteria integration. Limited by zero actuals (pre-launch). REC-001 margin dispute flagged as BLOCKER. Evidence Coverage 3.5/5, Confidence Honesty 5/5, Upgrade Path 4.5/5, Actionability 4.5/5, OpKit Reusability 4/5.

key_blockers: REC-001: Unresolved margin dispute (40% vs 67%) — BLOCKER for model lock. Model uses 60% working baseline with three-scenario handling. Resolution requires: (1) confirm fulfillment strategy, (2) confirm shipping absorption policy, (3) lock return rate with actuals.
next_action: Resolve REC-001 by confirming fulfillment and shipping policies. Populate 13-week cash flow and budget templates at launch. Recalibrate model with Month 1-3 actuals.
intelligence_gaps: Zero actual data for any financial variable (pre-launch)
REC-001 margin dispute unresolved — $88K Y1 swing between scenarios
Supplier payment terms not negotiated (prepayment vs Net 30)
Kill criteria churn threshold (15%) may be too aggressive for new brand
novel_contributions: Bifurcation-linked scenario planning (P-M3 vision): scenarios connected to measurable decision thresholds
Kill criteria integration in sensitivity analysis: every sensitivity variable maps to M30 existential metrics
REC-001 dual-scenario modeling: transparent handling of margin dispute across all outputs
Phase-gated financial reporting cadence: Founder Mode to Team Mode progression
